title: Fly Speed
excerpt: Fly Speed is the movement rating that lets a creature or effect move through the air under the flying rules. Questions about aerial movement resolve through the broader flying and speed entries.
markdown: # Fly Speed A Fly Speed is the part of a creature's movement profile that lets it travel through the air. Questions about staying aloft, switching between movement types, or losing aerial movement resolve through Flying, Special Speeds, Speed, and Changes to Your Speeds. Effects that keep a creature airborne or cause it to drop still interact with Hover and Falling when those rules become relevant.
